title: Flask secret keys should not be disclosed
description: Avoid hardcoding secret keys in your Flask application.
recommendation: Use environment variables or configuration files for secret keys.

compliant.code:
import os
app = Flask("myapp")
app.config.from_envvar('SECRET_KEY', default='my_secret_key')
compliant.description: Secret key loaded from environment variable.

why_is_this_an_issue: Hardcoded secret keys can leak sensitive information, potentially leading to unauthorized access.
how_to_fix: Use environment variables, configuration files, or secure secrets management services.

metadata.title: Flask secret keys should not be disclosed
